profileSummary: Experience across SaaS delivery, workflow design, UX, and education, with a practical understanding of how products are implemented, improved, and explained to different users.

bullets: Improved onboarding and workflows across web and tablet SaaS products.
Worked across product, UX, and implementation in Python, Flask, MongoDB, React, TypeScript, and Sass environments.
Promoted to UX/UI Lead while staying close to delivery.
Led discovery and usability work to find friction and improve adoption.
Helped modernise frontend architecture and increase consistency through a design system.
Collaborated closely with product and engineering in Agile delivery.
Supported tablet-first operator tooling in live operational settings.
Improved onboarding, setup journeys, and campaign workflows in a lead management SaaS platform.
Built and refined Angular interfaces for complex validation and data-led tasks.
Worked across UX and implementation to make day-to-day platform use clearer and easier to maintain.
Contributed to product structure, workflow design, and delivery in a Postgres-backed environment.
Designed workflows for monitoring, alerts, and location-aware decision-making in a safety-focused platform.
Translated UX decisions into production-ready interfaces in a C# .NET and Xamarin environment.
Improved geolocation-led tooling for faster operational awareness.
Worked across UX, UI, and delivery in a high-reliability context.
Design and deliver structured learning experiences across practical and technical topics.
Communicate clearly to users with different needs and confidence levels.
Sequence information to reduce cognitive overload and improve understanding.
Support accessibility, confidence-building, and practical progress in high-variation environments.

education: BA Graphic Design (User Experience), First Class Honours - Sheffield Hallam University
